violations.text: An open employees' beverage container was observed stored on the pizza station. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. -PIC removed open beverage container during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

Insect device observed over utensils and glassware. -Proper storage of insect device reviewed. -Insect control devices shall be installed so that: (1) The devices are not located over a FOOD preparation area. (2) Dead insects and insect fragments are prevented from being impelled onto or falling on exposed FOOD; clean EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, and LINENS; and unwrapped SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025
Handwashing sink located in the salad prep area was not in good repair. Per PIC hand sink is scheduled for repair 2/19/25. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The floors in the ware washing area and back kitchen area observed in poor repair. Tile grout needs to be refilled. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. -Per PIC floors due for repair in August 2025. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023
